summary.lv: SIA Riga Spirits & Wine Outlet meklē IT speciālistu/-i / datoru inženieri/-i — IT vides uzturēšana, lietotāju atbalsts, darbs ar uzņēmuma sistēmām (kase, e-veikals).
summary.en: Riga Spirits & Wine Outlet is looking for an IT Specialist / Computer Engineer to maintain IT environment, support users, and work with company systems (POS, e-shop).
